billing.title: Get GitHub Advanced Security active committers for an organization

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The organization name. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: advanced_security_product
parameters.description:
The security product to get GitHub Advanced Security active committers for.

For standalone Code Scanning or Secret Protection products, this parameter is required to specify which product you want committer information for. For other plans this parameter cannot be used.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see "Using pagination in the REST API."

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see "Using pagination in the REST API."

billing.descriptionHTML:
Gets the GitHub Advanced Security active committers for an organization per repository.

Each distinct user login across all repositories is counted as a single Advanced Security seat, so the total_advanced_security_committers is not the sum of advanced_security_committers for each repository.

If this organization defers to an enterprise for billing, the total_advanced_security_committers returned from the organization API may include some users that are in more than one organization, so they will only consume a single Advanced Security seat at the enterprise level.

The total number of repositories with committer information is tracked by the total_count field.

maximum_advanced_security_committers.description: The total number of GitHub Advanced Security licences required if all repositories were to enable GitHub Advanced Security

purchased_advanced_security_committers.description: The total number of GitHub Advanced Security licences purchased

budgets.title: Get all budgets

parameters.name: enterprise
parameters.description: The slug version of the enterprise name.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number of results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results per page (max 10).

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Filter budgets by scope type.

budgets.descriptionHTML:
Note

This endpoint is in public preview and is subject to change.

Gets all budgets for an enterprise. The authenticated user must be an enterprise admin or billing manager. Each page returns up to 10 budgets.

id.description: The unique identifier for the budget

budget_type.description: The type of pricing for the budget

budget_amount.description: The budget amount limit in whole dollars. For license-based products, this represents the number of licenses.

prevent_further_usage.description: The type of limit enforcement for the budget

budget_scope.description: The scope of the budget (enterprise, organization, repository, cost center)

budget_entity_name.description: The name of the entity for the budget (enterprise does not require a name).

budget_product_sku.description: A single product or sku to apply the budget to.

will_alert.description: Whether alerts are enabled for this budget

alert_recipients.description: Array of user login names who will receive alerts

budgets.description: Array of budget objects for the enterprise

has_next_page.description: Indicates if there are more pages of results available (maps to hasNextPage from billing platform)

total_count.description: Total number of budgets matching the query

Note

This endpoint is in public preview and is subject to change.

Creates a new budget for an enterprise. The authenticated user must be an enterprise admin, organization admin, or billing manager of the enterprise.

statusCodes.description: Validation failed, or the endpoint has been spammed.

cost-centers.title: Get all cost centers for an enterprise

parameters.description: Set to active or deleted to only list cost centers in a specific state.

bodyParameters.name: name

azure_subscription.description: Azure subscription ID associated with the cost center. Only present for cost centers linked to Azure subscriptions.

cost-centers.title: Add resources to a cost center

parameters.name: enterprise
parameters.description: The slug version of the enterprise name.

parameters.name: cost_center_id
parameters.description: The ID corresponding to the cost center.

bodyParameters.name: users
bodyParameters.description: The usernames of the users to add to the cost center.

bodyParameters.name: organizations
bodyParameters.description: The organizations to add to the cost center.

bodyParameters.name: repositories
bodyParameters.description: The repositories to add to the cost center.

cost-centers.descriptionHTML:
Adds resources to a cost center.

The usage for the resources will be charged to the cost center's budget. The authenticated user must be an enterprise admin in order to use this endpoint.

response.description: Response when adding resources to a cost center

example.message: Resources successfully added to the cost center.

resource_type.description: The type of resource that was reassigned.

name.description: The name of the resource that was reassigned.

previous_cost_center.description: The previous cost center of the resource.

statusCodes.description: Response when adding resources to a cost center

Remove resources from a cost center.

The usage for the resources will no longer be charged to the cost center's budget. The authenticated user must be an enterprise admin in order to use this endpoint.

usage.title: Get billing premium request usage report for an enterprise

parameters.name: enterprise
parameters.description: The slug version of the enterprise name.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single year. The value of year is an integer with four digits representing a year. For example, 2025. Default value is the current year.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single month. The value of month is an integer between 1 and 12. Default value is the current month. If no year is specified the default year is used.

parameters.name: day
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single day. The value of day is an integer between 1 and 31. If no year or month is specified, the default year and month are used.

parameters.name: organization
parameters.description: The organization name to query usage for. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user name to query usage for. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model name to query usage for. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: product
parameters.description: The product name to query usage for. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: cost_center_id
parameters.description: The ID corresponding to a cost center. An ID of 'none' will target usage not associated to any cost center.

usage.descriptionHTML:
Gets a report of premium request usage for an enterprise. To use this endpoint, you must be an administrator or billing manager of the enterprise.

Note: Only data from the past 24 months is accessible via this endpoint.

response.description: Response when getting a billing premium request usage report

year.description: The year for the usage report.

month.description: The month for the usage report.

day.description: The day for the usage report.

enterprise.description: The name of the enterprise for the usage report.

user.description: The name of the user for the usage report.

organization.description: The name of the organization for the usage report.

product.description: The product for the usage report.

model.description: The model for the usage report.

id.description: The unique identifier of the cost center.

name.description: The name of the cost center.

unitType.description: Unit type of the usage line item.

pricePerUnit.description: Price per unit of the usage line item.

grossQuantity.description: Gross quantity of the usage line item.

grossAmount.description: Gross amount of the usage line item.

discountQuantity.description: Discount quantity of the usage line item.

discountAmount.description: Discount amount of the usage line item.

netQuantity.description: Net quantity of the usage line item.

netAmount.description: Net amount of the usage line item.

statusCodes.description: Response when getting a billing premium request usage report

usage.title: Get billing usage report for an enterprise

parameters.name: enterprise
parameters.description: The slug version of the enterprise name.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single year. The value of year is an integer with four digits representing a year. For example, 2025. Default value is the current year.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single month. The value of month is an integer between 1 and 12. If no year is specified the default year is used.

parameters.name: day
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single day. The value of day is an integer between 1 and 31. If no year or month is specified, the default year and month are used.

parameters.name: cost_center_id
parameters.description: The ID corresponding to a cost center. The default value is no cost center.

usage.descriptionHTML:
Gets a report of usage by cost center for an enterprise. To use this endpoint, you must be an administrator or billing manager of the enterprise. By default this endpoint will return usage that does not have a cost center.

Note: This endpoint is only available to enterprises with access to the enhanced billing platform. For more information, see "About the enhanced billing platform for enterprises."

response.description: Response when getting a billing usage report

date.description: Date of the usage line item.

quantity.description: Quantity of the usage line item.

unitType.description: Unit type of the usage line item.

pricePerUnit.description: Price per unit of the usage line item.

grossAmount.description: Gross amount of the usage line item.

discountAmount.description: Discount amount of the usage line item.

netAmount.description: Net amount of the usage line item.

statusCodes.description: Response when getting a billing usage report

usage.title: Get billing usage summary for an enterprise

parameters.name: enterprise
parameters.description: The slug version of the enterprise name.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single year. The value of year is an integer with four digits representing a year. For example, 2025. Default value is the current year.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single month. The value of month is an integer between 1 and 12. Default value is the current month. If no year is specified the default year is used.

parameters.name: day
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single day. The value of day is an integer between 1 and 31. If no year or month is specified, the default year and month are used.

parameters.name: organization
parameters.description: The organization name to query usage for. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: repository
parameters.description: The repository name to query for usage in the format owner/repository.

parameters.name: product
parameters.description: The product name to query usage for. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: sku
parameters.description: The SKU to query for usage.

parameters.name: cost_center_id
parameters.description: The ID corresponding to a cost center. An ID of 'none' will target usage not associated to any cost center.

usage.descriptionHTML:
Note

This endpoint is in public preview and is subject to change.

Gets a summary report of usage for an enterprise. To use this endpoint, you must be an administrator or billing manager of the enterprise. By default, this endpoint will return usage across all cost centers in the enterprise.

Note: Only data from the past 24 months is accessible via this endpoint.

response.description: Response when getting a billing usage summary

year.description: The year for the usage report.

month.description: The month for the usage report.

day.description: The day for the usage report.

enterprise.description: The name of the enterprise for the usage report.

organization.description: The name of the organization for the usage report.

repository.description: The name of the repository for the usage report.

product.description: The product for the usage report.

sku.description: The SKU for the usage report.

id.description: The unique identifier of the cost center.

name.description: The name of the cost center.

unitType.description: Unit type of the usage line item.

pricePerUnit.description: Price per unit of the usage line item.

grossQuantity.description: Gross quantity of the usage line item.

grossAmount.description: Gross amount of the usage line item.

discountQuantity.description: Discount quantity of the usage line item.

discountAmount.description: Discount amount of the usage line item.

netQuantity.description: Net quantity of the usage line item.

netAmount.description: Net amount of the usage line item.

statusCodes.description: Response when getting a billing usage summary

usage-reports.title: List usage report exports

parameters.name: enterprise
parameters.description: The slug version of the enterprise name.

usage-reports.descriptionHTML:
Note

This endpoint is in public preview and is subject to change.

Lists all usage report exports for an enterprise. The authenticated user must be an enterprise admin or billing manager.

id.description: Unique identifier for the usage report export

start_date.description: The start date for the report

end_date.description: The end date for the report

status.description: The current status of the report export

download_urls.description: URLs to download the completed report. Only present when the report status is `completed`.

created_at.description: When the report export was created

actor.description: The login of the user who requested the export

usage-reports.title: Create a usage report export

parameters.name: enterprise
parameters.description: The slug version of the enterprise name.

bodyParameters.name: report_type
bodyParameters.description: The type of usage report to generate

bodyParameters.name: start_date
bodyParameters.description: The start date for the report in YYYY-MM-DD format

bodyParameters.name: end_date
bodyParameters.description: The end date for the report in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today (UTC) if not provided.

bodyParameters.name: send_email
bodyParameters.description: Whether to send an email notification to the requester when the report is ready. Defaults to false.

usage-reports.descriptionHTML:
Note

This endpoint is in public preview and is subject to change.

Initiates the generation of a usage report export for an enterprise. The report will be processed asynchronously and can be downloaded once completed. The authenticated user must be an enterprise admin or billing manager.

id.description: Unique identifier for the usage report export

start_date.description: The start date for the report

end_date.description: The end date for the report

status.description: The current status of the report export

download_urls.description: URLs to download the completed report. Only present when the report status is `completed`.

created_at.description: When the report export was created

actor.description: The login of the user who requested the export

usage-reports.title: Get a usage report export

parameters.name: enterprise
parameters.description: The slug version of the enterprise name.

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier (UUID) for the usage report export.

usage-reports.descriptionHTML:
Note

This endpoint is in public preview and is subject to change.

Gets the status and details of a usage report export by ID. The authenticated user must be an enterprise admin or billing manager.

id.description: Unique identifier for the usage report export

start_date.description: The start date for the report

end_date.description: The end date for the report

status.description: The current status of the report export

download_urls.description: URLs to download the completed report. Only present when the report status is `completed`.

created_at.description: When the report export was created

actor.description: The login of the user who requested the export
